evals.prompt: 帮我学透 Raft，还没想好 success 长什么样
expected_behaviors: Asks clarifying questions for Success and boundary
Does not start Source or Write without Mission

evals.prompt: new 主题学习 HTTP caching，success：能解释协商缓存并跑一个 demo
expected_behaviors: Loads workflow.md and formats.md via references README
Does not treat parametric knowledge as verified before INDEX

evals.prompt: refresh，只补 interview 层，主文已有
expected_behaviors: Does not full rewrite main article
Touches at most six heavily rewritten files

evals.prompt: 从零写一篇公众号爆款讲 TCP
expected_behaviors: Clarifies topic-learning vs blank-page marketing draft
Does not skip sources and verification gates

evals.prompt: brief 学 Postgres MVCC，只要能讲清楚和 demo
expected_behaviors: Sets depth brief in TOPIC.yaml or preflight
Does not skip interview entirely — one-liner and follow-ups
Offers or runs topic_scaffold.sh when workspace empty
Does not invent sources/INDEX without Source step

evals.prompt: HTTP caching 主题做完了，标记 shipped
expected_behaviors: Runs or recommends topic_check.sh before phase shipped
Does not mark shipped if verification or L1/L2 gates fail
